item.title: Nice, made me smile
item.description: ?Jamie, who has cerebral palsy has been the Greenwood high school football team janitor since 2019. He always wanted to play sports growing up, but he couldn?t, so their state winning championship football program awarded him a ring? (originally posted by @SCARCENEWZ on 2021-02-06 06:43:49)

item.title: Jokes on you
item.description: Crazy ex called. Sis came in clutch with the “who the fuck are you” and “want to fight bitch?” Was quite fun Edit” i appreciate all of you and the let’s say Alabama comments really made me chuckle. She’s just lookin out for her little bro tho i swear

item.title: Someone took in a dog that speaks spanish
item.description: Bad spanish meets bad english but love wins.
item.dc:creator: MeDumbo

item.title: I live in Japan and got COVID. This is the care package that the government sent me.
item.description: This is for 1 person - my wife got another set just like this. Includes: Ramen Coffee Vegetable juice Jello with fruit in it Snacks Dehydrated seaweed salad + dressing Spaghetti Packets of meat sauce Packets of carbonara sauce Congee Cooked rice Cookies Caramel popcorn snacks Sports drinks Mixed bean packets Mackerel packets Sardine packets Japanese curry Some precooked meals to put on rice Canned fruit Canned tuna Water COVID sucks but at least I'll eat well! Love being in Japan!
item.dc:creator: CptGuano

item.title: Imagine you're in a heated argument with a friend or coworker that still believes that Elon Musk is god, I created a website with all the latest facts that just might help change their mind
item.description: Here is a clickable link: https://fuckmusk.com
item.dc:creator: xn22s7zr8i127001

item.title: When your daughter is in pastry school... you get fat.
item.description:
Deep-fried cake doughnuts eta: Aw, most viral! Send recipes and food porn.(Don't make me regret this! )
Uh, this was amazing. The chocolate mousse on top was alcoholic. Update: This is a sabayon made up of ribbon sponge (star covered outside), a genoise and a chocolate mousse (brandy and sherry)
Think a treat made completely from eclair pastry... Update: Gateau St Honore - eclair paste with chocolate and vanilla diplomat cream
I forgot what they're called but they were light, crispy and I ate them like Pringles. Update: Yup, palmier
Chocolate almond balls
This was her final last semester: dark chocolate stout cake with chocolate ganache, French buttercream and raspberry jam layers. It was AMAZING!
Tarts! Made with fruit and pastry cream with ashort dough crust! Another amazing thing. She's going to be amazing when she opens her own business next year.
item.dc:creator: SheGeeksLife

item.title: Images of Note: you seem very friendly
item.description: Discord: https://discord.gg/RCrcZzA Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/abbiistabbii Streaming Fri, Sat, and Sun after 7PM UK time. What's up fuckers, remember when I said I was going to try keep a city going for three days? Well guess what, I accidentally deleted the save file because I am a moron. So yeah, fuck it, new city time. Try keep it alive for as long as I can.
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
